chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1685 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.7243/2023 3. For hearing of main case 05-03-2024 Mr. Muhammad Tarique Panhwar, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Badruddin Memon, Advocate for Respondent No.6 Mr. Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General a/w SIP/ SIO Liaqat Ali of PS Lakhi Ghulam Shah.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- I.O is present. He has filed medical report of petitioner No.1 stating that she is aged about 17/18 years. He further submits that he has recorded her statement, she has supported her marriage on free will, therefore, he would dispose of the case under ‘C’ class. After such report is submitted before the concerned Magistrate, he shall act in accordance with law and dispose of the case as recommended by the I.O. Counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and this petition is dispose of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
